Company overview

Coated paper & flexible packaging, made in India.

K P Packaging Ltd. is a Mumbai based manufacturer and distributor of coated papers and flexible packaging with over 30 years of experience. The company runs a Korean built extrusion coating and lamination plant in Silvassa, India, and supplies pharmaceutical, food & beverage, FMCG and medical/surgical packaging to 425+ clients across 20+ countries.

Two armsIn house manufacturing + authorized mill distribution
16 gradesCoated papers, boards & foil laminates
Korean lineState of the art extrusion coating & lamination
CertifiedFSC, FDA & ISO aligned quality
What we do

Two arms, one promise: dependable packaging.

We manufacture extrusion coated laminates and distribute a broad range of mill grade papers, so you can source coating, printing and substrate from a single partner.

Extrusion Coating & Lamination

Poly (PE) coating on printed & unprinted Paper, Board, PET, BOPP, Aluminium Foil and Fabric.

Rotogravure Printing

High resolution, multi colour gravure printing for sharp, durable, on brand packaging.

Slitting & Rewinding

Multiple slitting and rewinding machines for precise reel widths to customer spec.

Paper Distribution

Authorized distributor for leading Indian paper mills across a broad grade range.

Shop by industry

Solutions for the sectors we serve.

From moisture barriers for medicine to food safe cupstock, find the right material by where it's used.

Pharmaceutical

Barrier papers and foil laminates for tablet strips, ORS sachets and blister packs.

Food & Beverage

Food safe, grease and moisture resistant papers for cups, wraps and pouches.

FMCG & Retail

Printable, durable coated papers and boards for everyday branded products.

Medical & Surgical

Sterilizable, bacterial barrier papers for gloves, syringes and surgical disposables.

Our products

Coated papers, boards & laminates.

A snapshot of our best selling grades, explore the full catalogue for specs and applications.

Poly Coated Glassine Paper

Smooth, super calendered barrier paper for pharmaceutical packaging.

Machine Glazed / Sandwich Paper

Poly Coated Chromo Paper

Why K P Packaging

Why companies choose us.

Three decades of converting expertise

Over 30 years in coated paper and flexible packaging, from a PVC leather cloth pioneer to a modern primary packaging house.

Manufacturing + distribution under one roof

In house extrusion coated laminates plus authorized distribution for leading Indian paper mills, source coating, printing and substrate from a single partner.

State of the art Korean coating line

A modern extrusion lamination and coating plant in Silvassa, with rotogravure printing and multiple slitting & rewinding machines.

Trusted by industry leaders

Supplies Wockhardt, Cipla, Dr. Reddy's, Godrej, Wipro, Zydus, Amul, Parksons and Intas across 20+ countries.

Pharma and food grade quality

FSC and FDA aligned barrier papers for medicines, ORS sachets, blister packs, paper cups and food packaging.

By the numbers

Three decades of converting expertise.

30+Years of expertise
20+Countries served
425+Clients worldwide
Certified & compliant
FAQ

Frequently asked questions

What does K P Packaging do?
K P Packaging manufactures extrusion coated paper laminates and distributes a wide range of mill grade papers for primary and flexible packaging, serving the pharmaceutical, food & beverage, FMCG and medical/surgical industries.
Where is K P Packaging located?
Its corporate office is in Lower Parel, Mumbai, Maharashtra, and its manufacturing plant is in Sankeshwar Industrial Estate, Silvassa, Dadra and Nagar Haveli, India.
Is K P Packaging a manufacturer or a distributor?
Both. K P Packaging manufactures extrusion coated laminates in house and is also an authorized distributor for multiple Indian paper mills.
Does K P Packaging export internationally?
Yes. K P Packaging serves 425+ clients across more than 20 countries and is actively expanding its international business.
What types of coated paper does K P Packaging make?
Glassine, MG Poster, Chromo, Cupstock, MG Kraft, 3 ply and 4 ply foil laminates, Folding Box Board, Duplex Board, Greaseproof, Maplitho, Non Tearable, PE coated stiffener, tissue, and medical Bactite and Grid Lacquer papers.
Is K P Packaging's paper food safe and pharma grade?
Yes. It supplies FDA and FSC aligned glassine and barrier papers for pharmaceuticals and food safe cupstock and greaseproof papers for food and beverage packaging.
How do I request a quote from K P Packaging?
Contact the corporate office at prem@kppackaging.com or +91 85916 56966, the plant at sales@kppackaging.com or +91 85916 94328, or use the enquiry form on kppackaging.com.

Let's build your next pack.

Tell us your substrate, barrier and print needs, we'll recommend the right grade and get you a quote within a business day.
